info.title: Cargo API
info.description: Customer-facing and operational cargo API. The OpenAPI spec documents two bearer token contexts: customer bearer tokens for customer accounts, and staff/admin bearer tokens for admin, china_staff, and mongolia_staff accounts.

tags.name: Customer API
tags.description: Customer-facing endpoints. Customers should use customer bearer tokens. Admin tokens may still be accepted on some support-oriented endpoints.

tags.name: Staff/Admin API
tags.description: Operational endpoints for admin, China staff, and Mongolia staff accounts. These require staff/admin bearer tokens.

tags.name: Shared API
tags.description: Endpoints available to both customer and staff/admin roles. Use the bearer token that matches the signed-in account.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication endpoints. Sign-in returns different bearer tokens depending on the signed-in account role.

tags.name: Staff/Admin Auth
tags.description: Administrative Better Auth endpoints that require a staff/admin bearer token.

customerBearerAuth.description: Bearer session token returned after POST /auth/sign-in/email with a customer account. Use this for customer and shared endpoints.

staffBearerAuth.description: Bearer session token returned after POST /auth/sign-in/email with an admin, china_staff, or mongolia_staff account. Use this for staff/admin and shared endpoints.

post.description: Customer endpoint. Use a customer bearer token. Admin bearer tokens are also accepted for support operations. Create a cargo by tracking number with optional description

get.description: Shared endpoint. Use the bearer token that matches the signed-in account role: customer token for customers, staff/admin token for admin or staff accounts. List cargos with optional filters by status, payment status, fulfillment type, or tracking number

post.description: Customer endpoint. Use a customer bearer token. Admin bearer tokens are also accepted for support operations. Set pickup or home delivery after the cargo has arrived in Mongolia

400.description: Response for status 400

403.description: Response for status 403

404.description: Response for status 404

get.description: Shared endpoint. Use the bearer token that matches the signed-in account role: customer token for customers, staff/admin token for admin or staff accounts. Search by tracking number, phone, description, and optional status filters. Admin can also filter by customer name/email.

403.description: Response for status 403

get.description: Shared endpoint. Use the bearer token that matches the signed-in account role: customer token for customers, staff/admin token for admin or staff accounts. Get counts by cargo status and payment status

403.description: Response for status 403

get.description: Shared endpoint. Use the bearer token that matches the signed-in account role: customer token for customers, staff/admin token for admin or staff accounts. Returns the uploaded parcel image from China warehouse

403.description: Response for status 403

404.description: Response for status 404

post.summary: Mark cargo as received in China
post.description: Staff/admin endpoint. Use a staff/admin bearer token from an admin, china_staff, or mongolia_staff account. Optionally uploads a parcel image to R2 and stores a retrievable link

400.description: Response for status 400

404.description: Response for status 404
Response for status 404

post.description: Staff/admin endpoint. Use a staff/admin bearer token from an admin, china_staff, or mongolia_staff account.
Staff/admin endpoint. Use a staff/admin bearer token from an admin, china_staff, or mongolia_staff account.

400.description: Response for status 400

404.description: Response for status 404
Response for status 404

post.description: Staff/admin endpoint. Use a staff/admin bearer token from an admin, china_staff, or mongolia_staff account.
Customer endpoint. Use a customer bearer token. Admin bearer tokens are also accepted for support operations.

400.description: Response for status 400

get.description: Shared endpoint. Use the bearer token that matches the signed-in account role: customer token for customers, staff/admin token for admin or staff accounts. Search payments by status, method, payment id, and cargo id

404.description: Response for status 404

post.description: Staff/admin endpoint. Use a staff/admin bearer token from an admin, china_staff, or mongolia_staff account.

get.description: Shared endpoint. Use the bearer token that matches the signed-in account role: customer token for customers, staff/admin token for admin or staff accounts.
Simple in-memory list endpoint used to verify build-time OpenAPI generation

post.description: Sign in with a social provider

callbackURL.description: Callback URL to redirect to after the user has signed in

errorCallbackURL.description: Callback URL to redirect to if an error happens

disableRedirect.description: Disable automatic redirection to the provider. Useful for handling the redirection yourself

nonce.description: Nonce used to generate the token

scopes.description: Array of scopes to request from the provider. This will override the default scopes passed.

requestSignUp.description: Explicitly request sign-up. Useful when disableImplicitSignUp is true for this provider

loginHint.description: The login hint to use for the authorization code request

200.description: Success - Returns either session details or redirect URL

schema.description: Session response when idToken is provided
